description: DayPage Agent OS — 把现有被动编译系统升级为主动演化引擎。源规格: tasks/prd-daypage-agent-os.md。在现有 Inngest(durable queue) / Postgres+pgvector / change_log(审计) / prompt_log(预算) / ingest_sources(五环采集) / telegram webhook 基础上，新增 Gateway 主动调度 + 任务树(Git式分支)演化 + Suggester(任务建议) + 定时推 Telegram + 用户选择派发 + 分级执行(轻活自建沙箱 / 重活外包 Claude Code·OpenClaw·Ralph) + 产物回流飞轮。北极星闭环: 系统每小时调度 CC session 进展、结合用户信息推理任务建议、推送到 Telegram inline buttons、用户点选即派发执行。执行环境为 Linux 服务器(Web/Node/Postgres 全可用，无 iOS/Xcode)。所有 story 验收含 Typecheck passes; 后端逻辑 story 含 Tests pass; UI story 含 Verify in browser using dev-browser skill。技术栈: Next.js 16 App Router + Drizzle ORM + Inngest + Postgres(pgvector) + Upstash Ratelimit + zod。本地 dev 须同跑 npm run dev 与 npm run dev:inngest(见 web/CLAUDE.md)否则 Inngest 静默 no-op。新表迁移用 drizzle-kit generate。复用既有: db/schema.ts、db/client.ts、lib/inngest/、api/ingest、api/ingest/telegram/webhook、auth.ts、components/ui。

userStories.title: 新增 trees 与 tree_nodes 表 (任务树数据模型)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Git-style task tree to store long-term goals and their evolving branches.
acceptanceCriteria: 在 web/src/lib/db/schema.ts 新增 trees 表: id uuid pk, user_id uuid fk users cascade, title text, status pgEnum tree_status('active'|'archived') default 'active', created_at timestamptz default now
新增 tree_node_kind pgEnum('goal'|'branch'|'leaf') 与 tree_node_status pgEnum('growing'|'mature'|'merged'|'pruned')

新增 tree_nodes 表: id uuid pk, tree_id uuid fk trees cascade, parent_id uuid (自引用 nullable), kind tree_node_kind, status tree_node_status default 'growing', title text, heat real default 0, evidence_memo_ids jsonb default '[]', page_id uuid fk pages set null nullable, created_at/updated_at timestamptz
导出 Tree/NewTree/TreeNode/NewTreeNode 类型
为 tree_nodes 加 index(tree_id) 与 index(user 经由 tree)
drizzle-kit generate 生成 migration 成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 新增 gateway_jobs 表 (job 状态机)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a durable job table so the orchestrator survives restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: schema.ts 新增 gateway_job_status pgEnum('queued'|'running'|'gated'|'done'|'failed'|'dead')

新增 gateway_jobs 表: id uuid pk, user_id uuid fk, type text, tree_id uuid nullable, payload jsonb default '{}', status gateway_job_status default 'queued', idempotency_key text unique, gate_state text nullable, attempts integer default 0, last_error text nullable, created_at/updated_at timestamptz
加 index(user_id,status) 与 unique(idempotency_key)
导出 GatewayJob/NewGatewayJob 类型
drizzle-kit generate 生成 migration 成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 新增 task_suggestions 表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to persist AI-generated task suggestions awaiting user selection.
acceptanceCriteria: schema.ts 新增 task_suggestion_status pgEnum('open'|'selected'|'dispatched'|'dismissed')

新增 task_suggestions 表: id uuid pk, user_id uuid fk cascade, tree_node_id uuid fk tree_nodes set null nullable, title text, rationale text, estimate text nullable, suggested_target text nullable, status task_suggestion_status default 'open', payload jsonb default '{}', created_at timestamptz
加 index(user_id,status)
导出 TaskSuggestion/NewTaskSuggestion 类型
drizzle-kit generate 生成 migration 成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: 新增 work_orders 与 agent_sessions 表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to track dispatched work orders and agent backend sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 work_order_gate pgEnum('auto'|'approve-first'|'approve-result') 与 work_order_status pgEnum('pending'|'gated'|'running'|'done'|'failed')
新增 agent_backend pgEnum('claude-code'|'openclaw'|'ralph'|'sandbox') 与 agent_session_status pgEnum('active'|'idle'|'timed_out'|'closed')

新增 work_orders 表: id uuid pk, user_id fk, suggestion_id uuid fk task_suggestions set null nullable, intent text, context jsonb default '{}', output_spec text nullable, gate work_order_gate default 'approve-first', callback jsonb nullable, budget_tokens integer nullable, status work_order_status default 'pending', result_ref text nullable, created_at timestamptz

新增 agent_sessions 表: id uuid pk, user_id fk, backend agent_backend, external_ref text nullable, project text nullable, status agent_session_status default 'active', last_heartbeat_at timestamptz nullable, tokens_used integer default 0, created_at timestamptz
导出对应类型; drizzle-kit generate 成功
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Policy/Gate Engine 模块 (预算+限速+gate判定)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a single policy engine guarding budget, rate, and side-effect gating.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 web/src/lib/gateway/policy.ts: checkBudget(userId,treeId?) 读 prompt_log 求和与上限比较返回 {allowed,spent,limit}
classifyGate(intent): 'auto'|'approve-first' — 树内变更/生成文本/外部只读=auto, 外部写/改代码/发消息=approve-first
circuitState(backend) 读最近失败计数返回是否熔断 (连续 N=5 次失败暂停)
复用 Upstash Ratelimit 做 dispatch 限速 helper
为 classifyGate 与 checkBudget 写 vitest 单测
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: gateway_jobs 入队/出队 helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need idempotent enqueue and atomic claim of jobs.
acceptanceCriteria: 新增 web/src/lib/gateway/jobs.ts: enqueueJob({userId,type,treeId?,payload,idempotencyKey}) — 冲突 idempotency_key 时 no-op 返回已存在 job
claimJob() 用 SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED 原子取一个 queued job 置 running
completeJob(id)/failJob(id,error) 更新状态与 attempts; 超过 maxAttempts(=3) 置 dead
写 vitest 单测覆盖幂等去重与 fail→dead 转换
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: CC connector readProgress (本地读 transcript)

acceptanceCriteria: 新增 web/src/lib/connectors/claude-code.ts: readProgress({project}) 读取 ~/.claude/projects/<encoded>/ 下最新 transcript jsonl, 解析出最近 N 条用户消息+助手摘要, 返回 {project, summary, lastActivityAt}
路径不存在或为空时返回 null 而非抛错 (优雅降级)
解析失败的单行跳过不中断 (记 warn, 非静默全失败)
写 vitest 单测用 fixture jsonl 验证解析
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Evolver loop — observe/plan/act (长枝)

acceptanceCriteria: 新增 lib/gateway/evolver.ts: evolveTree({treeId}) observe(读节点+证据) → plan(LLM 判断是否该长新分支/标枯枝) → act(仅树内写)
act 只做: 在 tree_nodes 插入新 branch 节点 + page_links 关联, 或将节点标 status='mature' 生成 task_suggestion
剪枝(prune)与派发不在此自动执行, 仅生成建议待闸门
全程写 change_log; 记 prompt_log
写 vitest 单测 mock LLM 验证长新分支落库
